name: Democrats.org
subject: RSVP: Watch President Obama’s farewell address →
body:
We'll send you a reminder before it starts! **Add your name if you plan on watching President Obama's farewell address on Tuesday, January 10th, and we'll send you a special reminder so you don't miss out.

** **[RSVP](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Farewell-Address1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+RSVP&utm_campaign=em_20170108_dnc3_nd&source=em_20170108_dnc3_nd")**
[](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Farewell-Address1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20170108_dnc3_nd&source=em_20170108_dnc3_nd") [](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Farewell-Address1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=em_20170108_dnc3_nd&source=em_20170108_dnc3_nd") [](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Farewell-Address1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=em_20170108_dnc3_nd&source=em_20170108_dnc3_nd")
**[http://my.democrats.org/Farewell-Address](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/Farewell-Address1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+httpmydemocratsorgFarewellAddress&utm_campaign=em_20170108_dnc3_nd&source=em_20170108_dnc3_nd")**

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1a3/4067b0a/23526f8fa/7e79dd17/4053371082/VEsA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170108_dnc3_nd&source=em_20170108_dnc3_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1a3/4067b0a/23526f8fa/7e79dd14/4053371082/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170108_dnc3_nd&source=em_20170108_dnc3_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1a3/4067b0a/23526f8fa/7e79dd15/4053371082/VEsO/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170108_dnc3_nd&source=em_20170108_dnc3_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1a3/4067b0a/23526f8fa/7e79dd12/4053371082/VEsP/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170108_dnc3_nd&source=em_20170108_dnc3_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|

subject: Inauguration Seal Lapel Pin Inside
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Get your Official Inauguration Seal Lapel Pins now. |
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecdba3V9BAG3KbCHjWgaBDRvDRMN6aaaaCHDjBMHFH4za?r=5@09132&h=astliofv3-_dpXli.flp&i=h&u=&u=x4x~y-7lkdrjruXo7oXsbo7sfq7lkk7mcf7w7w7kcBbBy&w7w)

Friend,

I am so excited about the new Inaugural Collection, and I know you will be too!

[**Today we are offering the Official Inauguration Seal Lapel Pin as a set of 2 for you to proudly wear on January 20.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecdba3V9BAG3KbCHjWgaBDRvDRMN6aaaaCHDjBMHFH4za?r=5@09132&h=astliofv3-_dpXli.flp&i=i&u=&u=x4x~y-7lkdrjruXo7oXsbo7sfq7lkk7mcf7w7w7kcBbBy&w7w)
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecdba3V9BAG3KbCHjWgaBDRvDRMN6aaaaCHDjBMHFH4za?r=5@09132&h=astliofv3-_dpXli.flp&i=j&u=&u=x4x~y-7lkdrjruXo7oXsbo7sfq7lkk7mcf7w7w7kcBbBy&w7w) Let the President-Elect know you stand with him and are looking forward to his leadership.

There's no better way to commemorate this historic event than with your collectible Official Inauguration Seal Lapel Pin.

[**Grab your set of 2 lapel pins now before we sell out.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecdba3V9BAG3KbCHjWgaBDRvDRMN6aaaaCHDjBMHFH4za?r=5@09132&h=astliofv3-_dpXli.flp&i=f&u=&u=x4x~y-7lkdrjruXo7oXsbo7sfq7lkk7mcf7w7w7kcBbBy&w7w)

[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecdba3V9BAG3KbCHjWgaBDRvDRMN6aaaaCHDjBMHFH4za?r=5@09132&h=astliofv3-_dpXli.flp&i=g&u=&u=x4x~y-7lkdrjruXo7oXsbo7sfq7lkk7mcf7w7w7kcBbBy&w7w)
Alex
Trump Store Manager

****[Get Your Lapel Pins](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecdba3V9BAG3KbCHjWgaBDRvDRMN6aaaaCHDjBMHFH4za?r=5@09132&h=astliofv3-_dpXli.flp&i=e&u=&u=x4x~y-7lkdrjruXo7oXsbo7sfq7lkk7mcf7w7w7kcBbBy&w7w)****
